'''Red Star Squadron''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] formed and led by the [[Countess/Legends|Countess]] [[Iran Ryad]] some time after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

The unit was presumably disbanded when its leader was convicted of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].

{{Military-stub}}
